data.body:
Anyhoo, paying €2.85 (or even €2.50) for a stamp - a digital stamp that doesn’t even have its own artwork - is fucking insane.

You don’t like *anyone* that much to spend €2.85 on a scrawled missive. If government and medical went properly digital, nobody would ever send one outside of Christmas.
